header.title: Data Vault
header.description: A reusable vault of demo identities for the Smart Autofill engine. Add them manually or import a spreadsheet; each one remembers the sites it has already been used on.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, username, or label...

empty.title: Your data vault is empty
empty.description: Add an identity manually or import an Excel/CSV sheet to start building your autofill vault.
empty.filteredDescription: Try a different search, or clear the filter.

form.descAdd: Add a single persona to your data vault. Fields marked * are required.

import.title: Import from Excel / CSV
import.descStep1: Choose an .xlsx, .xls, or .csv file. The first row should be your column headers. Up to 1000 rows per import.
import.descStep2: Map your columns to identity fields. Detected {{count}} row(s) in {{fileName}}.
import.mappedCount_one: {{count}} field mapped. Rows with no name/email/username are skipped.
import.mappedCount_other: {{count}} fields mapped. Rows with no name/email/username are skipped.

errors.noRows: That file has no readable header row or data rows.
errors.nothingMapped: No rows to import — map at least one of First name / Last name / Email / Username.

confirm.deleteOne: Delete identity "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSelected_one: Delete {{count}} selected identity? This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSelected_other: Delete {{count}} selected identities? This cannot be undone.
confirm.resetSelected_one: Reset the "used on" history for {{count}} selected identity? They become available on every site again.
confirm.resetSelected_other: Reset the "used on" history for {{count}} selected identities? They become available on every site again.

errors.load: Could not load the data vault.
errors.deleteSelected: Could not delete the selected identities.
errors.resetSelected: Could not reset the selected identities.
